question: Which year from 2005-2010 has the lowest total CTA bus route ridership? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A transit operations analyst wants to pinpoint the lowest-ridership year for buses during the mid-2000s.

1.fact: Summing MonthTotal by year (from Month_Beginning) for 2005-2010, 2006 has the lowest total at 296915179.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2005-2010 has the lowest total CTA bus route ridership? (Parse Month_Beginning to Year; sum MonthTotal by Year; select the minimum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Sum MonthTotal by year (2005-2010) and select the minimum; the lowest year is 2006.
